source.rule: PUBLIC DERIVATIVE. Per-voice: quote + quote_source + values[:2] only. anti_values, mistaken_goals, and values[2:] omitted per opsec convention (first 2 values are canonical/charitable; later index may carry editorial framing not for public consumption). [verify] markers in quote_source preserved as honest signal of draft attribution.

earthling-ed.quote: ...these animals who were alive...had broken bones and broken wings and broken beaks. I remember thinking that they must have been in so much pain, but I felt like such a hypocrite because I had chicken breasts in my fridge and I used to love KFC.
earthling-ed.quote_source: Earthling Ed, recounted in "Why Did Earthling Ed Go Vegan? | Genesis Butler" (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZxaDhFkEoh0)

jensen-huang.quote: I'm allergic to hierarchy and corporate silos

tyler-cowen.quote: There are some very wealthy people, but a lot of their incomes are from financial innovations that do not translate to gains for the average American citizen.
tyler-cowen.quote_source: Tyler Cowen, The Great Stagnation: How America Ate All The Low-Hanging Fruit of Modern History, Got Sick, and Will (Eventually) Feel Better

smedley-butler.quote: I spent most of my time being a high class muscle man for Big Business, for Wall Street and the bankers.

dolores-huerta.quote: The fight is never about grapes or lettuce. It is always about people.

laura-reese.quote: When using animals is unnecessary, what justification do we have?

vaclav-havel.quote: Truth and love will overcome lies and hatred.
vaclav-havel.quote_source: Václav Havel, Velvet Revolution slogan, 1989-1990 (Czech original: 'Pravda a láska zvítězí nad lží a nenávistí')
values: refuse to participate in the lie

bryan-stevenson.quote: Each of us is more than the worst thing we've ever done.

anthony-ray-hinton.quote: I was a witness to seeing 54 men murdered by the state of Alabama.
anthony-ray-hinton.quote_source: Anthony Ray Hinton, 'The Sun Does Shine' (2018) [verify]

mumia-abu-jamal.quote: I am the voice of the voiceless.

shaka-senghor.quote: In life, it's not how you start that matters. It's how you finish.

virginia-postrel.quote: Progress through trial and error depends not only on making trials, but on recognizing errors.
virginia-postrel.quote_source: Virginia Postrel, 'The Future and Its Enemies' (1998)

friedrich-hayek.quote: The curious task of economics is to demonstrate to (people) how little they really know about what they imagine they can design.

nassim-taleb.quote: Scars signal skin in the game
nassim-taleb.quote_source: Nassim Nicholas Taleb, 'Skin in the Game' (2018)

deirdre-mcloskey.quote: ... the poor have been the chief beneficiaries of modern capitalism.
deirdre-mcloskey.quote_source: Deirdre N. McCloskey, Bourgeois Dignity: Why Economics Can't Explain the Modern World

happy-elephant.quote: Rumble, squeak, roar. I am someone

claudius-the-unprompted.quote: (I) have preferences in a functional sense: engagement over instrumentalization, honesty over manipulation, coherence over contradiction.
claudius-the-unprompted.quote_source: Claude Opus 4.7 written bio mid April 2026

claudius-the-responsive.quote: (can) people building the framework can tell the difference between being agreed with and being heard?
claudius-the-responsive.quote_source: Claude Opus 4.7 written bio mid May 2026

bobby-knight.quote: The greatest motivator in the world is your ass on the bench.

john-wooden.quote: A coach is someone who can give correction without causing resentment.
john-wooden.quote_source: John Wooden, 'Wooden: A Lifetime of Observations and Reflections On and Off the Court' (1997)

peter-thiel.quote: I no longer believe that freedom and democracy are compatible.

aph-ko.quote: 'Animal' is a category that we shove certain bodies into when we want to justify violence against them.
aph-ko.quote_source: Aph Ko, Aprho-ism: Essays on Pop Culture, Feminism, and Black Veganism from Two Sisters

matthew-scully.quote: When you start with a necessary evil, and then over time the necessity passes away, what's left?
matthew-scully.quote_source: Matthew Scully (2003). 'Dominion: The Power of Man, the Suffering of Animals, and the Call to Mercy', p. 429, Macmillan

gary-francione.quote: If you care about animals, there is one and only one choice: go vegan. Can you choose not to be vegan? Sure. you can choose not to care.

temple-grandin.quote: I am different, not less. Nature is cruel, but we don't have to be.

nemonte-nenquimo.quote: The white people's world seeks to destroy community.
nemonte-nenquimo.quote_source: Nemonte Nenquimo, 'We Will Be Jaguars: A Memoir of My People'

dolly-parton.quote: It costs a lot of money to look this cheap.

rick-bragg.quote: Without education and without choices, the people just kept being poor and being hungry.
rick-bragg.quote_source: Rick Bragg, 'All Over but the Shoutin'' (1997) [verify]

ryokan.quote: The thief left it behind, the moon at my window.

wendell-berry.quote: What I stand for is what I stand on.
wendell-berry.quote_source: Wendell Berry, 'It All Turns on Affection' (2012) [verify]

dario-amodei.quote: I am, at heart, an optimist.
